details.goal: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/, verify the login page loads with the Swag Labs branding, enter username 'standard_user' and password 'secret_sauce' into the respective fields, click the Login button, and verify you are redirected to the inventory page that displays multiple products with the title 'Products' visible at the top. Also verify the shopping cart icon is visible in the top right corner

details.goal: On the SauceDemo inventory page, first verify that at least 6 products are displayed. Then use the sort dropdown to sort products by 'Price (low to high)'. Add the first product (lowest price) to the cart by clicking its 'Add to cart' button, then add the third product to the cart as well. Verify the shopping cart badge shows '2' indicating two items. Take a screenshot of the inventory page showing the added items

details.goal: Click on the shopping cart icon to navigate to the cart page. Verify that exactly 2 items are in the cart with their correct names and prices matching what was added. Verify the total price is displayed. Remove one of the items from the cart by clicking its 'Remove' button. Verify only 1 item remains in the cart and the cart badge count updated. Click the 'Checkout' button to proceed to the checkout information page
